# License — illustrations-undraw

## Upstream

- Author: Katerina Limpitsouni
- Primary site: https://undraw.co
- unDraw license: open-source; free for commercial and personal use; attribution not required; images may not be resold as-is.

## Acquisition note

Acquired via `git clone --depth 1` of a community unDraw mirror repository. `.git` directory removed post-clone. No modifications to the SVG files themselves.

## Use in Clawmachine

Internal non-commercial use by a single UK operator (Regan Cooney) for a private electronics fix-and-flip tool. Recolouring via CSS `fill` is expected; no sublicensing, no resale of the illustrations themselves.

Fair use position: zero-dollar internal prototype, no distribution, no monetisation of the assets.
